query:
INSERT INTO bundle_courses (bundleId, courseId, courseOrder)
SELECT 3, id,
  CASE
    WHEN title = 'The Fivefold Ministry' THEN 0
    WHEN title = 'Christian Leadership' THEN 1
    WHEN title = 'Church Administration' THEN 2
  END
FROM courses
WHERE title IN ('The Fivefold Ministry', 'Christian Leadership', 'Church Administration');
